title: [packit] Propose downstream failed for release v5.4.0-rc3
body:
Packit failed on creating pull-requests in dist-git (https://src.fedoraproject.org/rpms/podman.git):

You can retrigger the update by adding a comment (`/packit propose-downstream`) into this issue.

comments.body:
Wait looks like it worked regardless of the error here: https://src.fedoraproject.org/rpms/podman/pull-request/232
So I guess we can just close this

cc @lsm5
